selected_dialects.reason: Vacuum chamber body: OD 200 mm, ID 180 mm, length 400 mm — a hollow axisymmetric cylinder, naturally expressed via revolve_profile with cut_center_bore.
Front and rear cover plates (220×220×20 mm) are rectangular prismatic plates; extrude_rectangle and cut_hole handle the observation window (Ø100) and pump ports (2×Ø50).
Three independent components (chamber body, front cover, rear cover) must be assembled; composition provides translate_solid, place_component, boolean_union for assembly.

selected_domain_skills.reason: Domain context for vacuum chamber geometry: cylindrical body with end flanges, viewport, and pump port placement conventions.

safety_notes: Reference geometry only — not certified for vacuum service or pressure vessel code compliance.
Wall thickness (10 mm) is parametric only; no strength or buckling validation is performed.
Assembly is geometric only; no weld/seal detail is generated.
